name: surveyjs-bridge-demos
description: SurveyJS V3 CSS bridge demos (Bootstrap, shadcn, MUI) over a single shared schema package.

scripts.dev:bootstrap: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,demo -c blue,magenta,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "pnpm --filter @bridge/bootstrap dev"
scripts.dev:bootstrap:creator: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,creator-core,creator-react,demo -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-creator/packages/survey-creator-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-creator/packages/survey-creator-react" "pnpm --filter @bridge/bootstrap dev"
scripts.dev:mui: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,demo -c blue,magenta,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "pnpm --filter @bridge/mui dev"
scripts.dev:shadcn: concurrently -k -n core,react-ui,adapters,demo -c blue,magenta,cyan,green "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core" "npm run watch:dev --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-react-ui" "npm exec --prefix ../survey-library/packages/survey-core -- rollup -c rollup.adapters.config.mjs -w --environment emitMinified" "pnpm --filter @bridge/shadcn dev"
